items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Plans Submitted for 16 Flats on Hurst Green Church Site
items.summary: A planning application proposes demolishing the deconsecrated Methodist Church on Hurstlands and replacing it with a four-storey block of 16 flats. The scheme would include six one-bedroom, eight two-bedroom and two three-bedroom homes.

items.title: 2026/616/TPO: 15 Brassey Hill, Limpsfield, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0ES
items.description: T1) - English Oak – Reduce in height by 3m and reduce lateral spread by 3m to shape and balance.  Branches are to be pruned back to strong growth points so as to retain a natural appearance.
items.headline: Pruning planned for protected oak at Limpsfield home
items.summary: A tree work application has been submitted for 15 Brassey Hill in Limpsfield, where an English oak protected by a Tree Preservation Order would be reduced in height and spread by 3 metres. The work aims to shape and balance the tree, with branches pruned back to strong growth points to keep a natural appearance.
